# Scripture Unity AI

> AI-powered interfaith scripture research platform for searching, comparing, and studying the Qur'an, Bible, and Ethiopian Bible with scholarly context.

Scripture Unity AI helps users explore religious texts across traditions through neutral, scholarly AI responses. Users can search any question across scriptures, compare verses and topics side-by-side, read full chapters/surahs with AI-generated reflections, and explore curated topics.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the platform with featured topics, daily verse, and reading entry points.
- [Search](/search): Ask any question and get AI-generated responses across the Bible, Qur'an, and Ethiopian Bible.
- [Topics](/topics): Browse curated themes (love, justice, mercy, prayer, etc.) across all traditions.
- [Compare](/compare): Compare verses, topics, and theological concepts side-by-side across faiths.
- [Understanding](/understanding): Educational guides on interfaith topics and scriptural interpretation.
- [Read the Bible](/scripture/bible): Browse and read books of the Holy Bible with AI-generated commentary.
- [Read the Qur'an](/scripture/quran): Browse and read Surahs with Arabic, English translation, and AI reflections.
- [Read Ethiopian & Other Scriptures](/scripture/other): Read Ethiopian biblical texts including Enoch, Jubilees, and Meqabyan.
